recommendations.title: Chuck
recommendations.overview: A drama inspired by the life of heavyweight boxer Chuck Wepner.

recommendations.title: Monsieur Lazhar

recommendations.title: Sound of Freedom
recommendations.overview: The story of Tim Ballard, a former US government agent, who quits his job in order to devote his life to rescuing children from global sex traffickers.

recommendations.title: Misery

recommendations.title: The Guernsey Literary & Potato Peel Pie Society
recommendations.overview: Free-spirited writer Juliet Ashton forms a life-changing bond with the delightful and eccentric Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, when she decides to write about the book club they formed during the occupation of Guernsey in WWII.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: The Words
